prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低位次分别为5400名、5446名、6725名、7191名、7761名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约2361名，2025年基准位次约7761名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年40人、2022年43人、2023年45人、2024年42人、2025年36人、2026年36人，2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第19名（Top20），近年排名稳定在19名左右，属于国内顶尖师范类学府；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类辟谣回应，无负面事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第37位），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年江西省曾出现低关注度投档异常，但非浙江省，影响有限；第五轮学科评估中A+学科6个（中国史、中国语言文学、地理学、心理学、教育学、马克思主义理论），A学科6个，A-学科6个，A-及以上共18个，学科实力极为突出，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2023年以来呈分化观望态势，但顶尖师范院校仍具较强吸引力；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人（较2025年29.1万大幅增加约37.5%），竞争显著加剧；省控线2025年普通类一段490分，近年基本稳定；北京师范大学位于北京市，非浙江省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；浙江省考生对京沪高校历来有较高报考热情，地域偏好不构成明显抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.5%导致竞争加剧，以及学校顶尖层次与优势学科的持续吸引力，在2025年基准7761名基础上预计位次进一步后移；预测2026年最低位次约8261名，波动区间7761–8761名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（北京校区）
- 人文科学试验班（北京校区）
- 历史学类（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 社会科学试验班（北京校区）
- 教育学类（北京校区）
- 物理学类（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（北京校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8261名，区间7761–8761名。位次在区间下限（7761名）附近可重点冲刺一档数学类、人文科学试验班等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约8261名）建议以二档社会科学试验班、教育学类为主，兼顾一档保底；位次在区间上限（8761名）附近建议以三档理科试验班保底，同时可尝试二档专业。北师大优势学科高度集中，建议结合个人兴趣与学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were 5400, 5446, 6725, 7191, and 7761 respectively, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2361 in the past 4 years, and a baseline ranking of about 7761 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 40 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 42 in 2024, 36 in 2025, and 36 in 2026, with the 2026 plan unchanged from 2025, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable around 19th in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities in China; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management rumor responses, with no negative incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (total ranking 37th), short video exposure is above average; in 2022, Jiangxi Province had an abnormal low-attention admission, but not in Zhejiang, with limited impact; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 6 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, Marxist Theory), 6 A disciplines, 6 A- disciplines, totaling 18 A- and above, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strong attraction to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors has shown a divergent wait-and-see trend since 2023, but top normal universities still have strong appeal; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000 (a significant increase of about 37.5% from 291,000 in 2025), with intensified competition; the provincial control line for the general category in 2025 is 490 points, basically stable in recent years; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Zhejiang, with no local enrollment preference; Zhejiang candidates have always had high enthusiasm for universities in Beijing and Shanghai, and regional preference does not constitute a significant suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the enrollment plan for 2026 unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 37.5% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province leading to intensified competition, and the sustained attraction of the university's top level and advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 7761, the ranking is expected to further shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 8261, with a fluctuation range of 7761–8761.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Mathematics (Beijing Campus)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Beijing Campus)
- History (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (Beijing Campus)
- Education (Beijing Campus)
- Physics (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8261, range 7761–8761. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (7761) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Mathematics and Humanities Experimental Class; those with rankings in the middle (about 8261) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors like Social Sciences Experimental Class and Education, while also considering Tier 1 as a safety; those with rankings near the upper limit (8761) are advised to use Tier 3 Science Experimental Class as a safety, and also try Tier 2 majors. BNU's advantageous disciplines are highly concentrated, so it is recommended to combine personal interests with discipline evaluation levels for comprehensive selection.
